problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
